overall.description: A high-performance sports car drives at speed through a desert highway in a racing game, passing under a large billboard archway and approaching a futuristic gas station with neon signage. The environment blends natural desert landscapes with cyberpunk-inspired structures under an overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: The car enters a massive overhead billboard structure that spans the highway, temporarily obscuring the sky. The structure features large illuminated advertising screens on both sides before the car emerges back into the open desert.

segments.scene_description: The car drives through an open desert stretch with mountains visible in the distance. Sparse vegetation including joshua trees dots the landscape. A yellow dune buggy suddenly overtakes on the right side, kicking up dust as it passes.

segments.scene_description: The car approaches a futuristic gas station featuring prominent CHOOH2 neon signage and illuminated red pillars. The station has a cyberpunk aesthetic with bright lights contrasting against the overcast desert sky. The car passes the station and continues along the highway as the mountains shift to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-performance sports car as it speeds from an industrial desert highway through a massive architectural gateway and toward a neon-lit futuristic outpost. It begins with the car drifting along an asphalt road flanked by power lines, with a distant industrial cityscape looming under an overcast sky. As the vehicle accelerates, it passes under a traffic light gantry and enters a massive overhead billboard structure, where illuminated advertising screens momentarily block the horizon before the road opens back into the desert. The scene then expands across a wide stretch of arid terrain dotted with joshua trees and distant mountains, just as a yellow dune buggy overtakes the car and kicks up a cloud of dust. Finally, the camera follows the car as it approaches a cyberpunk gas station defined by glowing red pillars and bright CHOOH2 neon signage, passing the station as the mountains shift toward the left.
